heading: Printing
label: 3714b Printing
notes: Amendments1997—Subsec. (a). substituted “Sections 501 through 517 and 1101 through 1123” for “Section 501”.Pub. L. 105–85
amendments: Amendments1997—Subsec. (a). substituted “Sections 501 through 517 and 1101 through 1123” for “Section 501”.Pub. L. 105–85

children.label: a
children.text: Sections 501 through 517 and 1101 through 1123 of title 44 shall not apply to direct purchase by the Commission for its use of printing, binding, and blank-book work in the Republic of Panama when the Commission determines that such direct purchase is in the best interest of the Government.

children.label: b
children.text: This section shall not affect the Commission’s authority, under chapter 5 of title 44, to operate a field printing plant.
